description.name: Fraud Prevention Suite
description.tagline: Enterprise-grade fraud detection with 16+ engines, real-time bot blocking, and global threat intelligence.
description.long: Comprehensive fraud detection addon for WHMCS with Cloudflare Turnstile, device fingerprinting, IP/email intelligence, behavioral biometrics, velocity engine, Tor detection, OFAC screening, and cross-instance threat data sharing. Includes REST API with 4 tiers, 3D threat visualization globe, and colorblind accessibility mode.
